I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to filter tests by the "Integration" category when running `dotnet test`. Let me check the test file to see how categories are defined.

data.content:
The tests use MSTest's `[TestCategory]` attribute. Use the `--filter` option:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This will run only the tests tagged with `[TestCategory("Integration")]` — in this case, `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase` and `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`.
